name: Sandbag Bunker
prompt:
Vietnam War firebase command/fighting bunker. Hardened fortification for crew-served weapons or command post.

Physical structure:
- U-shaped sandbag walls about 1.5m tall, 0.6m thick (double-stacked bags)
  - Front wall: 3m wide with horizontal firing slot (0.3m tall gap at eye level ~1.2m up)
  - Side walls: 2.5m deep, connecting front to rear
  - Rear: open entrance, 1m wide gap
- Roof: PSP (pierced steel planking) sheets laid across top - use flat dark metal boxes
  - Sandbags stacked on roof for overhead protection (~0.3m layer)
- Interior: dirt floor at ground level, about 2m x 2m clear space
- Radio antenna: thin vertical pole on roof corner (~2m tall above roof)
- Sandbags same style as wall section: tan/olive, slightly irregular stacking

Colors: Sandy tan bags (0xc2a878), darker bags (0xa89060), dark steel PSP roof (0x555555), antenna (0x666666)
Orientation: Front facing +Z, entrance at -Z
Scale: Real-world meters (~3m wide, ~2.5m deep, ~1.8m tall with roof)
